scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.fix: npm run check:biome && npm run check:ts && npm run test:all
scripts.db:reset: supabase status && npm run db:generate-seed && supabase db reset && npm run db:gen-types
scripts.db:gen-types:
supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > src/lib/db/generated/database.types.ts.tmp && (printf '/*
 * This file is auto-generated by `npm run db:gen-types`
 * Do not edit manually - your changes will be overwritten
 *
 * To regenerate: npm run db:gen-types
 */
' && cat src/lib/db/generated/database.types.ts.tmp) > src/lib/db/generated/database.types.ts && rm src/lib/db/generated/database.types.ts.tmp
scripts.db:reset:prod: npm run db:generate-seed -- --prod && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local ./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/wipe-prod.ts && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local ./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/repair-migrations-prod.ts && supabase db push --include-all && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local ./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/seed-prod.ts && npm run db:gen-types:prod
